---
name: "README Source Grounding"
description: "Use when editing README.md to keep content grounded in this codebase and avoid naming external inspiration sources by default."
applyTo: "README.md"
---
# Documentation Source Policy

- Base README descriptions, examples, and claims on this repository's code and docs.
- Prefer evidence from local files before adding broader context.
- Prefer not to include external inspiration links, project names, or attribution unless the user explicitly asks for attribution in the current task.
- If external context is needed, translate it into neutral, project-focused language without naming the source.
- Keep README content actionable and concise: setup commands, tested workflows, and behavior observed in this codebase.

## Trigger Keywords

- README
- project overview
- setup instructions
- quickstart
- documentation rewrite
